title: 10 best herbal teas for insect bites
description: Thymus vulgaris, also known as thyme, teas helps with insect bites because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The active compounds in thyme, such as thymol and carvacrol, have been shown to reduce swelling and itching associated with insect bites. Thyme teas may also help to prevent infection by inhibiting the growth of bacteria that can enter the bite wound. Its soothing effects can provide relief and promote healing, making thyme teas a popular natural rem...
